blockingIssues.description: VAL-HR-001 decomposition threshold regression: PayrollCalculationService is 605 lines in HEAD, exceeding the under-500 focused-service target.

No migration_v2 script mirrors V150 payroll component schema changes (template thresholds/professional tax, payment_date, expanded payroll_run_lines fields, statutory payable account seeding), causing schema drift under flyway-v2.
Codered payroll validation fails reproducibly (CR_PayrollIdempotencyConcurrencyTest: 10 errors) due to migration_v2 schema mismatch, so milestone evidence cannot be considered complete.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to document that production runs with flyway-v2 profile/group and migration_v2 location, making migration-path expectations explicit.
Added test-codered-payroll command to .factory/services.yaml for deterministic reproduction of payroll codered/schema-drift issues during validation triage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a documented fallback path when Task-based reviewer spawning fails (for example due to model alias incompatibility), including explicit manual review artifact creation steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All Task launches in this run failed with Invalid model: custom:5.3 codex xhigh pro, requiring manual in-session review report authoring.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For features that add DB schema fields used by runtime logic, require migration parity checks for both active migration chains (v1 and migration_v2 when prod defaults to flyway-v2).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: V150 added payroll schema in v1 only, while migration_v2 lacked equivalent updates; codered payroll suite then failed under v2 schema bootstrap.

rejectedObservations.observation: Task-based reviewer spawn failure due to model alias mismatch (reported in multiple feature reviews)
